zh.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III是Robert Neville和Joan Atherton的兒子，於大約1323年出生在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素。他於1344年9月之前與Margaret de la Pole在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1378年在英國越可爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1413年4月4日在他的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾梅林。

zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III是Robert Neville和Joan Atherton的儿子，于大约1323年出生在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素。他于1344年9月之前与Margaret de la Pole在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1378年在英国越可爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1413年4月4日在他的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾梅林。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III was born about 1323, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England as the son of Robert Neville and Joan Atherton. He married Margaret de la Pole before September 1344, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1378, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Yorkshire, England. He died on 4 April 1413, in his hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Melling, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III est né environ 1323, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Robert Neville et Joan Atherton. Il a épousé Margaret de la Pole avant septembre 1344, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1378, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1413, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III wurde um 1323 in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Robert Neville und Joan Atherton geboren. Er hat vor September 1344 in Yorkshire, England Margaret de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1378, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. April 1413 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Melling, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III è nato il circa 1323 nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England come figlio di Robert Neville e Joan Atherton. Lui sposato Margaret de la Pole prima del settembre 1344, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1378, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Yorkshire, England. Morì il 4 aprile 1413, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Melling, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville IIIは約1323年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルでRobert NevilleとJoan Athertonの息子として生まれた。1344年9月以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1378年，56歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1413年4月4日に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアメリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III(은)는 대략 1323년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 Robert Neville(와)과 Joan Atherton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1344년 9월 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 Margaret de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1378년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1413년 4월 4일 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 멜링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Robert Neville e Joan Atherton. Ele casou-se com Margaret de la Pole antes setembro de 1344, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1378, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1413, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III родился около 1323 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert Neville и Joan Atherton. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de la Pole перед сентябрь 1344 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1378 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности еркшир, Англия. Он умер 4 апреля 1413 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Neville III nació aproximadamente 1323, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert Neville y Joan Atherton. Se casó con Margaret de la Pole antes de septiembre de 1344, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1378, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 4 de abril de 1413, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
